notes: Khong co JsonStringEnumConverter global, FE nen gui billingCycle dang so.
Body null se bi handler reject 400.
Free plan flow => requiresPayment = false, subscription != null, paymentIntentId = null.
Paid flow => requiresPayment = true, paymentIntentId != null, subscription = null.
purpose, billingCycle, status serialise thanh so.
checkoutUrl null cho den khi FE goi POST /api/payments/payos/create thanh cong.
GET /api/payments/{intentId} chi tra payment intent cua current user, khong co admin bypass.
Neu returnUrl rong/null, PayOsService fallback sang Modules:Subscription:PayOS:ReturnUrl.
Neu FE gui thang frontend URL vao returnUrl, backend /api/payments/payos/return co the bi bypass hoan toan.
CancelUrl frontend khong truyen o request nay; service se dung config CancelUrl neu co, neu khong se fallback ve returnUrl.
orderCode duoc tao 1 lan va co the duoc reuse neu goi create lai cho cung intent.
checkoutUrl la URL tuyet doi do PayOS tra ve.
status co the la already_succeeded | synced | ignored | updated | pending.
Webhook route luon tra 200 JSON ack, ke ca khi payload sai hay xu ly fail.

endpoints.name: SubscribeToPlan
problemCases: 400 ValidationProblemDetails neu body sai shape hoac billingCycle khong parse duoc.
400 ProblemDetails neu body null, plan inactive, hoac plan khong ho tro chu ky yeu cau.
404 ProblemDetails neu planId khong ton tai.
notes: Neu current user da co subscription status Active/Trial, paid flow se set payment intent purpose = SubscriptionUpgrade.
Neu price <= 0, backend active subscription ngay va tao them history, khong tao payment intent.

endpoints.name: GetPlansForPaymentScreens
problemCases: 400 ValidationProblemDetails neu isActive khong parse duoc.
notes: Duplicate route phuc vu purchase UI, mac dinh chi tra plan active.

endpoints.name: GetPaymentIntent
problemCases: 404 ProblemDetails neu intentId khong ton tai hoac intent khong thuoc current token user.
notes: Khong co admin bypass.
PlanName trong response duoc join qua SubscriptionPlan luc query.

endpoints.name: CreatePayOsCheckout
problemCases: 400 ValidationProblemDetails neu body sai shape hoac returnUrl qua 500 ky tu.
400 ProblemDetails neu intent da Succeeded, intent da Canceled/Expired, intent het han, PayOS chua duoc config, hoac PayOS tra loi.
404 ProblemDetails neu intentId khong ton tai hoac khong thuoc current user.
notes: Neu intent.ExpiresAt <= now, handler se update status sang Expired truoc khi throw 400.
orderCode reuse neu intent da co san orderCode; neu chua co thi se tao moi dang yyMMddHHmmss + 3 chu so ngau nhien.
Handler co the goi lai PayOS de tao payment link moi cho cung intent/orderCode.

endpoints.name: PayOsWebhook
notes: Body rong, {} hoac [] => 200 { status: ok, message: Test webhook received successfully }.
JSON sai format => 200 { status: error, message: Invalid JSON format }.
Handler verify payload.signature trong JSON body; x-signature header hien tai duoc doc nhung khong duoc dung de quyet dinh pass/fail.
Payload khong co data hoac signature fail hoac orderCode khong match => 200 { status: ignored } hoac { status: ok } tuy nhanh code.
Webhook duoc xu ly idempotent theo Provider=PAYOS + providerRef.

endpoints.name: PayOsReturn
notes: Neu status query la PAID/SUCCESS/COMPLETED va orderCode map duoc intent, redirect toi /payment/result?status=success&intentId={intentId}.
Moi truong hop con lai redirect toi /payment/result?status=failed.
Neu Modules:Subscription:PayOS:FrontendBaseUrl la absolute URL hop le, redirect se dung absolute base do + /payment/result.

endpoints.name: CheckPaymentStatus
problemCases: 404 ProblemDetails neu intentId khong ton tai hoac khong thuoc current user.
notes: Route debug nay khong goi PayOS; no chi doc snapshot local tu database.

endpoints.name: SyncPaymentFromPayOs
problemCases: 400 ProblemDetails neu intent chua co orderCode.
404 ProblemDetails neu intentId khong ton tai hoac khong thuoc current user.
notes: Neu PayOS bao PAID/SUCCESS/COMPLETED, route nay se reuse webhook flow voi SkipSignatureVerification = true.
Neu PayOS bao CANCELED/CANCELLED hoac EXPIRED/TIMEOUT, route cap nhat local intent status roi tra 200.

runtimeRules: Subscribe free-plan flow active subscription ngay va khong tao PaymentIntent.
Subscribe paid-plan flow tao PaymentIntent status RequiresPayment va ExpiresAt = now + IntentExpirationMinutes (default 15).
PaymentIntent purpose = SubscriptionUpgrade neu current user da co subscription Active/Trial, nguoc lai = SubscriptionPurchase.
CreatePayOsCheckout se reuse orderCode neu intent da co, neu chua co thi generate orderCode 15 chu so.
PayOsService fallback returnUrl tu request ve config ReturnUrl; cancelUrl fallback config CancelUrl, neu khong co thi = returnUrl.
Neu FE tu truyen returnUrl direct toi frontend, flow backend /api/payments/payos/return se khong duoc chay.
PayOS API yeu cau ClientId + ApiKey + SecretKey; thieu 1 trong 3 gia tri se bi reject 400 truoc khi tao link/query status.
Webhook signature sai khong tra 4xx; handler simply ignored. Runtime hien verify payload.signature, khong verify x-signature header.
Webhook payment success se upsert subscription Active, tao SubscriptionHistory va PaymentTransaction Succeeded, roi set intent status = Succeeded.
Webhook failure se set intent status = Canceled hoac Expired; transaction Failed chi duoc tao neu intent da co SubscriptionId.
GET /api/payments/{intentId}, debug/check-payment, debug/sync-payment deu chi allow current token owner, khong co admin override.
ReconcilePayOsCheckoutWorker delay 10 giay luc start, sau do chay theo CheckoutReconcileIntervalSeconds (default 30), batch size default 50, lookback default 24h.
Worker co the tu update status Expired/Canceled, backfill CheckoutUrl, hoac trigger sync paid neu webhook bi miss.

checkoutExpired400.title: Bad Request
checkoutExpired400.detail: Yeu cau thanh toan da het han.
checkoutExpired400.message: Yeu cau thanh toan da het han.

relatedNotes: Frontend purchase flow nen coi GET /api/payments/{intentId} la API read chinh sau checkout, khong phai webhook ack.
Neu FE can poll, hay poll GET /api/payments/{intentId} voi timeout ngan va stop khi status vao Succeeded/Canceled/Expired.
Khong nen tu parse query PayOS tren frontend de quyet dinh thanh cong that su; return route server da map ve success/failed va worker/webhook van co the thay doi local status muon hon.
